summary: Decent audience recording of the 10/22/78 show with clear sound, but reviewers give no detail on musical performance.
review: Both reviewers note that this is an audience (AUD) tape and describe the sound as fine or not too bad, indicating a generally good listening experience. No comments are made about the band’s playing, setlist flow, or standout moments, leaving the show quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Recording is described as decent/good, but there is no information on performance quality; with limited reviews confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the tape "fine sounding" and "not too bad," suggesting clear enough audio without major flaws, though no detailed technical analysis is provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on musical performance or set pacing were made in the reviews.
